intrigue_cards.name: Private Plane
intrigue_cards.description: Charter a private jet to rush your musicians to the studio.

intrigue_cards.name: Open Mic Night
intrigue_cards.description: Scout local talent at an open mic event. A hidden gem joins your roster.

intrigue_cards.name: Battle of the Bands
intrigue_cards.description: Host a battle of the bands and recruit the winners to your label.

intrigue_cards.name: Rhythm Section Bootcamp
intrigue_cards.description: Run an intensive workshop that produces a tight rhythm section.

intrigue_cards.name: Vocal Coach Masterclass
intrigue_cards.description: Hire a legendary vocal coach to train up new talent for your label.

intrigue_cards.name: Garage Band Discovery
intrigue_cards.description: Discover a promising garage band and sign them on the spot.

intrigue_cards.name: Festival Lineup Shuffle
intrigue_cards.description: A major festival cancellation frees up musicians looking for work.

intrigue_cards.name: Reunion Tour Fallout
intrigue_cards.description: A supergroup's reunion tour collapses. Scoop up the disillusioned musicians.

intrigue_cards.name: Music School Graduates
intrigue_cards.description: A fresh class of conservatory graduates is eager to prove themselves.

intrigue_cards.name: Studio Session Call
intrigue_cards.description: Put out an urgent studio session call and attract seasoned players.

intrigue_cards.name: Talent Show Scouting
intrigue_cards.description: Send scouts to a regional talent competition. They return with promising finds.

intrigue_cards.name: Underground Scene
intrigue_cards.description: Tap into the underground music scene and sign raw, hungry talent.

intrigue_cards.name: Touring Band Breakup
intrigue_cards.description: A touring band implodes mid-tour. Pick up the pieces for your roster.

intrigue_cards.name: Celebrity Endorsement
intrigue_cards.description: A famous producer recommends your label, attracting top-tier musicians.

intrigue_cards.name: Church Choir Raid
intrigue_cards.description: Recruit gifted vocalists from a renowned gospel choir.

intrigue_cards.name: Instrument Trade Show
intrigue_cards.description: Demo players at a trade show are looking for steady gigs. Sign them up.

intrigue_cards.name: Side Project Poaching
intrigue_cards.description: Lure musicians away from their low-priority side projects.

intrigue_cards.name: Jam Session Recruitment
intrigue_cards.description: Host a late-night jam session. The chemistry is perfect and new players sign on.

intrigue_cards.name: Contract Buyout
intrigue_cards.description: Buy out a rival's contract and steal their star guitarist.

intrigue_cards.name: Poach the Vocalist
intrigue_cards.description: Offer a rival's lead singer a better deal. They can't refuse.

intrigue_cards.name: Hostile Takeover
intrigue_cards.description: Leverage industry connections to poach key members from a rival label.

intrigue_cards.name: Sabotaged Soundcheck
intrigue_cards.description: A rival's equipment mysteriously malfunctions, costing them dearly.

intrigue_cards.name: Leaked Scandal
intrigue_cards.description: Leak an embarrassing story about a rival to the tabloids. They lose credibility and resources.

intrigue_cards.name: Exclusive Distribution Deal
intrigue_cards.description: Lock a rival out of a key distribution channel, draining their funds.

intrigue_cards.name: Rhythm Section Raid
intrigue_cards.description: Offer irresistible contracts to a rival's rhythm section.

intrigue_cards.name: Legal Dispute
intrigue_cards.description: Tie up a rival in a costly legal battle over songwriting credits.

intrigue_cards.name: Platinum Record Bonus
intrigue_cards.description: One of your albums goes platinum. The label rakes in the royalties.

intrigue_cards.name: Sold-Out Arena Tour
intrigue_cards.description: Your headliner sells out a nationwide arena tour. Revenue pours in.

intrigue_cards.name: Streaming Royalties Surge
intrigue_cards.description: A viral playlist feature sends your streaming numbers through the roof.

intrigue_cards.name: Merchandise Windfall
intrigue_cards.description: Limited-edition merch sells out in minutes. The profits are substantial.

intrigue_cards.name: Sync Licensing Deal
intrigue_cards.description: A hit TV show licenses one of your tracks. The sync fees are generous.

intrigue_cards.name: Corporate Sponsorship
intrigue_cards.description: A major brand signs a sponsorship deal with your top artist.

intrigue_cards.name: Grammy Award Winner
intrigue_cards.description: One of your artists wins a Grammy, bringing prestige to the label.

intrigue_cards.name: Hall of Fame Induction
intrigue_cards.description: A legendary artist on your roster is inducted into the Hall of Fame.

intrigue_cards.name: Critical Acclaim
intrigue_cards.description: Your latest release receives universal critical acclaim, boosting your reputation.

intrigue_cards.name: Viral Music Video
intrigue_cards.description: A music video goes viral overnight, putting your label on the map.

intrigue_cards.name: Lifetime Achievement Award
intrigue_cards.description: Your label receives an industry lifetime achievement honor.

intrigue_cards.name: Demo Tape Discovery
intrigue_cards.description: Unearth a stack of promising demo tapes from unsigned artists.

intrigue_cards.name: A&R Department Expansion
intrigue_cards.description: Expand your A&R team to uncover more signing opportunities.

intrigue_cards.name: Industry Networking Event
intrigue_cards.description: Attend an exclusive industry gala and discover new business opportunities.

intrigue_cards.name: Music Conference
intrigue_cards.description: Send your team to a major music conference. They return with new leads.

intrigue_cards.name: Manager's Rolodex
intrigue_cards.description: A retiring manager hands over their legendary contacts list.

intrigue_cards.name: Backstage Connections
intrigue_cards.description: Work the backstage scene and pick up insider tips and schemes.

intrigue_cards.name: Industry Gossip
intrigue_cards.description: Your publicist feeds you juicy industry gossip that opens new angles.

intrigue_cards.name: Paparazzi Intel
intrigue_cards.description: Paparazzi tips reveal opportunities and rivalries you can exploit.

intrigue_cards.name: Label Mole
intrigue_cards.description: A mole inside a rival label feeds you valuable strategic information.

intrigue_cards.name: Charity Concert
intrigue_cards.description: All labels participate in a charity mega-concert. Everyone benefits from the goodwill.

intrigue_cards.name: Music Industry Boom
intrigue_cards.description: A booming economy lifts all labels. Everyone sees increased revenue.

intrigue_cards.name: New Genre Explosion
intrigue_cards.description: A new genre takes the world by storm, attracting fresh talent to every label.

intrigue_cards.name: Government Arts Grant
intrigue_cards.description: A generous government arts grant funds the entire music industry.

intrigue_cards.name: Talent Scout's Find
intrigue_cards.description: Your talent scout reports back with several promising leads. Choose the best opportunity.

intrigue_cards.name: Industry Showcase
intrigue_cards.description: Host a massive industry showcase event. Everyone benefits, but you benefit most.
